Optional expressions let you capture his early appearances with a "right glance" expression part, plus shouting, smirking, and frightened faces. In combination with a optional head without hat, you can replicate all sorts of scenes! Other accessories include a variety of optional hands and a broken arm option. And it even includes a bonus option expression for the S.H.Figuarts <strong>SUPER SAIYAN VEGETA</strong> -AWAKENED SUPER SAIYAN BLOOD- figure (sold separately)!</p>

<p>From "Dragon Ball Z," the Earth's strongest man Krillin joins S.H.Figuarts! Featuring all-new sculpting and articulation to better capture his dynamic on-screen appearance.</p>
<p><strong>Krillin</strong> is very often shaved and does not have a nose. He is <strong>Goku's</strong> best friend and a brother-in-arms who fights alongside him many times. When he first appears, he's a surly teenager, but <strong>Muten Rôshi's</strong> training and life spent alongside <strong>Goku</strong> will help him grow wiser. He is originally quite a jealous and selfish person, so he does not respect <strong>Muten Rôshi's</strong> rules during his training. After a short rivalry with <strong>Son Gokû</strong>, he will become her best friend. Thanks to <strong>Son Gokû</strong>, he gradually becomes benevolent. In films mainly, <strong>Krillin</strong> is often used as a comic element. Although iconic and very strong, he is surpassed by many characters in the series, such as <strong>Piccolo</strong> or All <strong>Saiyans</strong>.</p>
